name: Permanent disability from job injury in Boise - extra pay?

mainEntity.name: Permanent disability from job injury in Boise - extra pay?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, scheduled or whole person impairment benefits.[9] Context: Idaho pays based on rating post-MMI.[9] Key factors: Doc exam sets percentage; body part values. Practical guidance: Dispute low ratings; vocational rehab too. Lump or monthly. Consult for max.
